name: clawpipe
description: LLM cost optimization pipeline + 6 AI security skills. Deterministic Booster, semantic cache, and self-learning router across 21 providers. Public measured benchmark in progress.

tools.name: clawpipe_prompt
tools.description: Send a prompt through the ClawPipe pipeline (Booster -> Pack -> Cache -> Route -> Call -> Learn).

tools.name: clawpipe_analyze_cost
tools.description: Estimate cost of a prompt without sending it.

tools.name: clawpipe_booster_check
tools.description: Check if Booster can resolve a prompt without an LLM call.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_triage
tools.description: Prioritize security findings by actual exploitability.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_remediation
tools.description: Generate a fix plus rollback for a vulnerability.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_compliance
tools.description: Write SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / HIPAA / GDPR audit evidence.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_threat_intel
tools.description: Enrich CVE / IOC with NVD/CIRCL-style context.

tools.name: clawpipe_skill_incident
tools.description: Reconstruct attack chain + recommend containment steps.

tools.name: clawpipe_report_to_jira
tools.description: Create a Jira issue from a budget breach, cost spike, or anomaly.

tools.name: clawpipe_report_to_notion
tools.description: Append a Notion page for cost digests or incident logs.
